actions.intent: Open with a route-adjacent clear but skip the ice payoff.
Spend a side action on broad board value.
Continue side clearing instead of breaking the central ice.
Spend another side action instead of converting the ice break into rescue progress.
Repair one dock set but keep avoiding the final rescue lane.
Continue broad clearing while the puppy remains trapped.
Take a side clear and allow the water to advance.
Continue side clearing after water rises.
Repair one dock set but keep delaying the extraction route.
Spend another side action instead of finishing the rescue.
Crowd the dock with route-adjacent residue.
Repeat the side clear and overflow before the payoff lands.

notes: Verified fail: repeated side clearing makes even the generous ice payoff collapse into dock overflow.
